query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS credential_verification_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  credential_id INT,
  abn VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  verification_type ENUM('abn', 'license', 'insurance', 'workers_comp', 'full') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('success', 'failed', 'pending') NOT NULL,
  result_data JSON,
  error_message TEXT,
  source VARCHAR(100),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qcNV4qQD7qpkaJ4.fb5a500c82ee --database APFRAaBLqYVeRNQZ9fu2LF --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS credential_verification_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  credential_id INT,
  abn VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  verification_type ENUM('abn', 'license', 'insurance', 'workers_comp', 'full') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('success', 'failed', 'pending') NOT NULL,
  result_data JSON,
  error_message TEXT,
  source VARCHAR(100),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
